patterns_recognized: HARD CAP 7 near-zero over-fire on four picks today (TOR@ATL +0.0049, TEX@STL +0.0010, PIT@HOU +0.0019, LAD@ARI +0.0059): all economically negligible gaps demoted pre-cap A/B+ stacks to B-/SKIP. Pattern first documented 5/30 (KC@TEX +0.0019); rule change to |gap|>=0.010 minimum pending but caps remain binding today.

SP-edge-against-pick + large-negative-PQI is a structural DOWNGRADE trigger: confirmed 5/28 LAA@DET (Rodriguez xERA + PQI against DET → 7-1 blowout); applied to MIA@WSH today (Lovelady 2.23 xERA edge over Bachar; PQI Δ=-36.2 against WSH). PLATINUM designation awarded on lineup-only conviction cannot override dual structural negatives.

Consecutive-day same-matchup loss caution: MIA won 7-3 at WSH on 6/1 (Sandy Alcantara dominant); same teams play again 6/2 with different SPs — qualitative loss narrative remains fresh and compounds existing signal weakness.

Large f5_full_delta with positive hl_bullpen_xwoba_gap = carry thesis structurally unsupported (5/26 archive rule): LAD@ARI has f5_full_delta=0.2997 (LAD wins F5 at 89%) with hl_bullpen_xwoba_gap=+0.0059 (ARI pen slightly worse). When pick-side pen is inferior AND Stage 1/2 delta is extreme, carry thesis has no structural support regardless of directional model signal.

DET @ TB.reasoning: D-grade with SP xERA against TB (Flaherty 0.35 xERA edge for DET) and -1.13pp negative edge; confidence_downgrade=True. BvP is all SMALL_SAMPLE; Yandy Díaz is an OWNER vs Flaherty (11 PA, shrunk 0.837) — a modest positive, but insufficient to override D-grade structural weakness. Stage 1/2 agree (delta=0.064). SKIP correctly enforced.
lessons_applied: D-grade SP-edge-against enforces SKIP
single OWNER BvP insufficient to override D-grade (5/28 CHC@PIT lesson)

SD @ PHI.reasoning: HARD CAP 1 (-3.66pp) and HARD CAP 10 (pick_prob=0.525, bottom-bucket) correctly enforce SKIP. Pre-cap A-minus (score=4) reflects legitimate conviction (F1_xera_gap=2.02, F3). BvP adds qualitative support: Tatis WEAK_VS Nola (10 PA, shrunk 0.565) and Machado WEAK_VS Nola (23 PA, shrunk 0.602) confirm SD's structural disadvantage vs Nola; PHI top-3 show elevated shrunk OPS vs Vásquez (Schwarber 0.789, Turner 0.850, Harper 0.945 — all SMALL_SAMPLE). Caps correctly enforced.
lessons_applied: HARD CAP 1 negative-edge enforcement
HARD CAP 10 bottom-bucket
BvP WEAK_VS confirms directional narrative but does not rescue cap

BAL @ BOS.reasoning: HARD CAP 10 (pick_prob=0.522, bottom-bucket) fires on a pre-cap score=1 (B-) with no F-signals beyond Stage-agree (+1). No SP edge in grade_reasons (Shane Baz vs Connelly Early). BvP: BOS leadoff Jarren Duran is WEAK_VS Early (15 PA, shrunk 0.618) — soft negative for BOS. No strong directional conviction on either side; SKIP is correct.

BvP WEAK_VS on pick-side leadoff batter is informative context, not a flip signal at this margin

MIA @ WSH.reasoning: DOWNGRADE to SKIP. SP edge 2.23 xERA AGAINST WSH (Lovelady better than Bachar) and PQI AGAINST pick (Δ=-36.2, largest negative PQI on today's slate) constitute the dual structural DOWNGRADE trigger documented in 5/28 pattern. confidence_downgrade=True and bullpen_fatigue stress flag compound this. MIA won 7-3 at WSH on 6/1 (consecutive-day same-matchup loss caution). BvP is all SMALL_SAMPLE. PLATINUM awarded on F2/F3 lineup-only conviction without SP support — historically the weakest PLATINUM archetype at ~43% hit rate.
lessons_applied: SP-edge-against-pick + PQI-against-pick dual DOWNGRADE trigger (5/28 LAA@DET pattern)
PLATINUM scrutiny: lineup-only conviction without SP support ~43% hit rate
consecutive-day same-matchup loss caution (6/1 MIA won 7-3)
confidence_downgrade + bullpen_fatigue stress-flag stack = reduce tier

CLE @ NYY.reasoning: HARD CAP 1 (-9.2pp) correctly enforced: market prices NYY at fair_prob=0.7199 vs model's 0.6279 — market is 9.2pp more confident in NYY. Pre-cap DIAMOND signals (F1=2.56, F2, F3 all confirm NYY) are legitimate directional conviction, but staking at -9.2pp below market confidence is deeply negative EV. CLE top-5 BvP vs Schlittler all NO_DATA (new/thin pitcher). Per 5/26: market pricing authority holds even on directionally correct picks; do not loosen CAP 1.
lessons_applied: HARD CAP 1 enforcement: market authority at -9pp gap
5/26 lesson: CAP 1 is EV-protecting even on directionally correct picks

KC @ CIN.reasoning: Grade B- (score=1) enforces no-stake but directional conviction for CIN is sound. F3_swing_take_gap=4291.8 fires; pen_strain=0.1178 (HIGH, above 0.115 threshold) signals CIN's offense can punish KC's bullpen in late innings. f5_full_delta=0.2307 with negative hl_bpen_gap (-0.0027) fits the 5/26 NYY@KC bullpen-carry archetype. confidence_downgrade and acute_roster dampen stake. BvP is mixed SMALL_SAMPLE; no decisive signal. CONFIRM directional call.
lessons_applied: HIGH pen_strain (>0.115) as directional CONFIRM amplifier
large f5_full_delta + negative bpen_gap = bullpen-carry directional signal (5/26 NYY@KC validation)
confidence_downgrade correctly holds stake at 0

TOR @ ATL.reasoning: HARD CAP 7 fires at hl_bpen_gap=+0.0049 (near-zero) on a pre-cap A-grade (score=7) stack with F2+F3+PQI+positive edge (14.64pp) all strongly aligned for ATL. Per 5/30 postgame, near-zero CAP 7 over-fire is a documented pattern, but rules remain binding until updated. ATL BvP: Olson MEANINGFUL vs Gausman (16 PA, shrunk 0.774, 2 HR) positive; Dominic Smith WEAK_VS Gausman (12 PA, shrunk 0.538) negative. Mixed BvP. Cap authoritative; CONFIRM SKIP.
lessons_applied: HARD CAP 7 enforced per current rules despite near-zero gap
5/30 near-zero CAP 7 over-fire pattern documented but not yet rule-changed — caps remain binding

CHW @ MIN.reasoning: HARD CAP 10 (pick_prob=0.522, bottom-bucket) combined with F1* thin-sample (Connor Prielipp for MIN has thin Statcast sample) and confidence_downgrade enforce zero-stake. Pre-cap A-minus (score=4) with F1*+F2. No BvP data available. Davis Martin (CHW away SP) won 5/28 MIN@CHW game 6-2, but today's roles differ and Prielipp's thin-sample undermines F1 reliability. Bottom-bucket + F1* thin-sample = correct no-stake architecture.
lessons_applied: HARD CAP 10 bottom-bucket enforcement
F1* thin-sample SP quarantine: opposing SP quality estimate unreliable
5/26: thin-sample F1* + sub-55% pick = treat as coin-flip regardless of other signals

TEX @ STL.reasoning: HARD CAP 7 (+0.0010, near-zero) and HARD CAP 10 (pick_prob=0.522, bottom-bucket) both fire on a pre-cap A-grade (score=5) stack with F3, SP edge 0.34 xERA (May > Eovaldi), and PQI+13.3. LAD @ ARI.reasoning: DOWNGRADE to SKIP beyond cap enforcement. HARD CAP 7 fires (+0.0059 — ARI HL bullpen slightly worse). f5_full_delta=0.2997 is extreme: LAD dominates F5 at 89.1% while ARI's bullpen must carry the full game — yet ARI's pen is inferior (positive bpen_gap). F1_xera_gap=1.86* adds thin-sample uncertainty on Soroka. Per 5/26 rule: large f5_full_delta with positive pen gap = carry thesis structurally unsupported. Cap is doubly justified qualitatively.
